text:
VOTE: REJECT
CONFIDENCE: 0.85
PROBABILITY: 0.40
FLAGS: Binary event risk (regulatory crackdown on crypto exchanges/stablecoins), Assumption failure (sustained positive macro conditions and uninterrupted institutional inflow), Correlation blind spots (correlation to broader risk-off sentiment in traditional markets)
REASON: The 67-day timeframe is insufficient to overcome the significant binary event risks and assumption failures that are being underweighted by the oracle's probability.
